other_observers: 51 observers thru present time have seen this bird; i am the original finder/reporter
specific_location: 308 country club park - thistle feeders at back of house
description: adult male plumaged LAGO with black face (chin important), pale gray back and head, flanks, yellow chest and wing bars, not a color/marking combo exhibited by any of the other carduelis finches.Behaviors: goldfinch flight pattern, feeding preference for niger thistle and Berlandiera lyrata similar to LEGO, interacts with LEGO. AMGO has not been present at same time as LAGO to myknowledge so i haven't seen this particular interaction.Call: flight calls somewhat like LEGO, but separable from LEGOPlumage: adult male breeding plumage
